API used to update password

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"description":"EmailUser object for which password has to update","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"userId":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"username":{"type":"string"},"emailId":{"type":"string"},"token":{"type":"string"},"password":{"type":"string"},"hashPassword":{"type":"string"}},"title":"EmailUser"}}},"required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Returns a Success code if the operation was successful","content":{"text/json":{}}},"403":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.FORBIDDEN if the token is invalid","content":{"text/json":{}}},"412":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.PRECONDITION_FAILED if the new password is same as current password","content":{"text/json":{}}},"500":{"description":"Returns a HttpStatus.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR if there was some other error that did not allow the operation to complete","content":{"text/json":{}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
